task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Sony Alpha a7 IV (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $2499.00 and wholesale is $1749.00. Product features: Full-frame mirrorless camera with 33MP sensor and 4K60p video. Reference: https://electronics.sony.com/imaging/interchangeable-lens-cameras/full-frame/p/ilce7m4-b

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Sony Alpha a7 IV. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Sony Alpha a7 IV. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
